Java: Revise OOP, collections, streams, exceptions, and build 3 console-to-API projects.
Create a Spring Boot REST API with validation, services, repositories, and tests.
Spring Boot: Learn controllers, services, JPA, validation, exception handling, and configuration.
Build a backend with login, profile, file upload, and job recommendation APIs.
REST: Practice HTTP methods, status codes, request validation, pagination, and error responses.
Document APIs with sample requests and test them using Postman.
MySQL: Study schema design, joins, constraints, indexes, and query optimization.
Create a project database with users, profiles, roles, and analysis history tables.
MongoDB: Learn document modeling, collections, indexes, aggregation, and schema design tradeoffs.
Store resumes, jobs, extracted skills, and matching outputs as documents.
JWT: Learn token structure, signing, expiration, and bearer-token API protection.
Implement login/register with JWT and protect all private endpoints.
Security: Study OWASP basics, password hashing, CORS, validation, and authorization.
Add role-based access for admin job management.
React: Master components, props, state, hooks, forms, and conditional rendering.
Build a multi-page resume upload and results dashboard.
JavaScript: Practice ES6 syntax, async/await, fetch, array methods, and modules.
Write API clients and handle loading/error states professionally.
CSS: Learn responsive grids, spacing systems, focus states, and accessible UI styling.
Polish the project for desktop, tablet, and mobile layouts.
Responsive Design: Practice mobile-first breakpoints, flexible grids, and text overflow handling.
Test your UI at 390px, 780px, and desktop widths.
Python: Revise functions, classes, typing, file handling, FastAPI basics, and packages.
Build text extraction and matching endpoints in FastAPI.
NLP: Learn tokenization, entity extraction, rule-based matching, embeddings, and evaluation.
Improve resume skill extraction using spaCy patterns and skill dictionaries.
BERT: Learn transformer embeddings, semantic similarity, and sentence-transformers.
Compare resumes and jobs using all-MiniLM-L6-v2 embeddings.
spaCy: Learn pipelines, tokenization, entity rulers, matchers, and custom components.
Create a skill extractor using phrase matching and normalization.
Machine Learning: Study supervised vs unsupervised learning, metrics, train/test split, and bias.
Add score breakdowns and evaluate matching quality with sample resumes.
Embeddings: Learn vector representations, cosine similarity, normalization, and ranking.
Use embeddings to rank jobs semantically, not only by keyword overlap.
Scikit-learn: Practice preprocessing, model training, evaluation metrics, and pipelines.
Prototype classification or ranking features for job recommendations.
Pandas: Learn data cleaning, filtering, grouping, joins, and CSV processing.
Analyze job/resume datasets and generate sample reports.
NumPy: Practice arrays, vector math, normalization, and cosine similarity.
Implement lightweight similarity scoring for offline fallback.
SQL: Practice SELECT, JOIN, GROUP BY, indexes, constraints, and transactions.
Write queries for user analytics and profile completeness.
Power BI: Learn data modeling, measures, slicers, and dashboard layout.
Create a dashboard showing match score distribution and skill gaps.
Docker: Learn images, containers, ports, volumes, and docker compose.
Containerize backend, frontend, NLP service, MySQL, and MongoDB.
Kubernetes: Learn pods, deployments, services, config maps, and scaling basics.
Deploy a simplified version of the app to a local Kubernetes cluster.
CI/CD: Learn build pipelines, tests, artifacts, and deployment steps.
Create GitHub Actions for frontend build and backend test.
AWS: Learn EC2, RDS, S3, IAM, security groups, and deployment basics.
Deploy backend and databases in a cloud-ready architecture.
Testing: Study unit, integration, API, and UI testing strategies.
Add backend service tests and frontend component flow tests.
Selenium: Learn browser automation, locators, waits, and test assertions.
Automate login, resume upload, and results page checks.
Postman: Practice collections, environments, auth headers, and API tests.
Create a Postman collection for all backend endpoints.
Cybersecurity: Study authentication, authorization, logging, vulnerabilities, and secure storage.
Review your app against OWASP Top 10 basics.
Database Design: Learn normalization, relationships, constraints, and document-vs-relational modeling.
Explain why MySQL stores users while MongoDB stores resumes/jobs.
React Native: Learn screens, navigation, components, state, and API integration.
Create a mobile version of the resume matching flow.
Git: Practice branches, commits, merges, pull requests, and conflict resolution.
Keep project milestones in separate branches with clean commit messages.
Communication: Practice explaining architecture, tradeoffs, bugs, and demos clearly.
Prepare a 5-minute project walkthrough and viva answers.
